role: Persistent draggable floating action handle that hosts the right-hand-man (V) overlay, its verb fan, brain chat panel, note composer, and channel post composer on every page.
capabilities: Draggable bottom-right V handle with position persistence
Expandable radial verb fan with live/soon verb honesty
Aim tracking via projection:select and projection:aim events
Three-question starter prompts and guided tour walkthrough
Note composer that saves comments via brain.direct
Open V-post composer to post to named channels
Territory label resolution for human-readable aim names
substance_why: The file implements a fully wired overlay with drag persistence, event-driven aim tracking, brain attachment, note saving, channel posting, a guided tour, and API fetches, not a stub.
interactions_present: Pointer drag to reposition the V handle
Tap handle to toggle verb fan
Tap live/soon verb pills to act or show honest soon state
Tap Ask to open brain panel
Tap Note to open note composer and save with Enter or Save button
Tap three starter questions to ask the brain
Tap Show me around to start guided tour
Tap Post to a channel toggle, select channel, type message, and send
Tap Got it / I’ll explore to dismiss greeting
Escape or outside press closes fan/panel/note
interactions_missing: Drive and Make verbs are contract-only and not operable (shown as soon)
No retry or recovery UI for a failed note save beyond an error message
No loading state while resolving territory labels
No keyboard focus trap or arrow-key navigation inside the fan
No resize handling to keep handle within viewport
No confirmation before posting to a channel
No undo after a note is saved
No UI feedback when brain module fails to attach
performance_risks: setPos called on every pointermove with no throttling, causing frequent React re-renders
Repeated fetch of /api/territory/label whenever binding changes even if the resulting address is unchanged
Unconditional setOpen(false) fired on every pointermove during a drag
Synchronous localStorage write inside the pointer-up drag path
Brain panel DOM is always mounted even when closed so fork can attach
reuse_why: The seam contracts (aim address, gallery:verb, forkVBrain attach, territory label/write) and operator-experience rules are worth keeping, but the monolithic component should be split for the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Extract VHandle component for drag, tap, and fan rendering
Extract BrainPanel component for fork attachment, starters, tour, and post composer
Extract NoteComposer component for annotation UI and save flow
Extract useAim hook/context for projection event handling, address/label/meaning state
Extract Greeting component for first-contact intro and tour start
Separate the post composer from the brain panel so each can evolve independently
